name: Mrs. Fields Blue Ribbon Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a separate bowl, cream together the brown sugar, granulated sugar, and butter until smooth.
4. Add eggs and vanilla extract to the sugar mixture, then blend until well combined.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the sugar/butter mixture, mixing until just combined.
6. Fold in the chocolate chips.
7. Using a silicone cookie scoop, drop mounds of dough onto a greased or parchment-lined baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 22-25 minutes, or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks before serving.
